_comment: WARNING: This egg was originally generated by the Pterodactyl Panel but has been manually modified. It supports selected Python versions and two dependency managers: pip (default) and uv (recommended). Do not modify unless you understand runtime and dependency impacts.
name: Python
author: itzzmateo@devflare.de
description: A Generic Python Egg for Pterodactyl
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ "{{AUTO_UPDATE}}" == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; if [[ "{{PY_ENV_MANAGER}}" == "uv" ]]; then uv pip install -U {{PY_PACKAGES}} || true; else pip install -U --prefix .local {{PY_PACKAGES}}; fi; if [[ -f /home/container/${REQUIREMENTS_FILE} ]]; then if [[ "{{PY_ENV_MANAGER}}" == "uv" ]]; then uv pip install -r ${REQUIREMENTS_FILE} || true; else pip install -U --prefix .local -r ${REQUIREMENTS_FILE}; fi; fi; /usr/local/bin/python /home/container/{{PY_FILE}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Python App Installation Script
# Server Files: /mnt/server

apt update
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ libtool python3-pip

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    exit 0
fi

if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

if [ -z "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo "using anon api call"
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo -e ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    if [ -d .git ]; then
        if [ -f .git/config ]; then
            ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        else
            exit 10
        fi
    fi

    if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
        git pull
    fi
else
    if [ -z ${BRANCH} ]; then
        git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    else
        git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    fi
fi

export HOME=/mnt/server

echo "Installing dependencies using {{PY_ENV_MANAGER}}"

if [[ "{{PY_ENV_MANAGER}}" == "uv" ]]; then
    if ! command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        curl -Ls https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh || true
        export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"
    fi

    if [[ ! -z ${PY_PACKAGES} ]]; then
        uv pip install ${PY_PACKAGES} || true
    fi

    if [ -f /mnt/server/${REQUIREMENTS_FILE} ]; then
        uv pip install -r ${REQUIREMENTS_FILE} || true
    fi
else
    if [[ ! -z ${PY_PACKAGES} ]]; then
        pip install -U --prefix .local ${PY_PACKAGES}
    fi

    if [ -f /mnt/server/${REQUIREMENTS_FILE} ]; then
        pip install -U --prefix .local -r ${REQUIREMENTS_FILE}
    fi
fi

echo "install complete"
exit 0

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: What branch to pull from github.

variables.name: User Uploaded Files
variables.description: Skip install if user uploads files

variables.name: App py file
variables.description: The file that starts the App.

variables.name: Python Environment Manager
variables.description: Package manager. pip is default (compatibility). uv is recommended (faster installs and modern resolver).
